snippet.title: All the Prime Minister‚Äôs Men  | Al Jazeera Investigations
snippet.description:
Click here for the Bangla Language: https://youtu.be/B1BM79J863o
An explosive investigation reveals how a criminal gang is colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh and has links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina.

Undercover reporters with the I-Unit expose how a former street mafia claims to have captured a state. The brother of Bangladesh‚Äôs army chief boasts that he can use police and paramilitary units to abduct rivals and earn millions in bribes.

Documents obtained by the I-Unit also show that head of the army has helped a convicted killer evade justice. And how the country‚Äôs military intelligence service has secretly bought spyware from Israel ‚Äď a country that Bangladesh does not recognise ‚Äď that can monitor the prime minister‚Äôs political rivals. 

The I-Unit invited all those involved in this investigation to respond to our findings. They included Bangladesh‚Äôs Prime Minister, Home Minister, Inspector General, Police Commissioner and all four Ahmed Brothers. 

None responded to our inquiries.

After the release of the investigation, Bangladesh‚Äôs Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement describing our findings as a ‚Äúsmear campaign‚ÄĚ that was orchestrated by opponents of the regime based abroad.
It dismissed statements made by the brother of Bangladesh‚Äôs Chief of Army Staff s baseless and said Haris Ahmed had no links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina or any other state institution.

ŗ¶óŗ¶£ŗ¶§ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶úŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶≠ŗßāŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶Üŗ¶óŗßčŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶Čŗ¶™ŗ¶į ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶§ŗ¶•ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶¶ŗ¶®ŗ•§

ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗßüŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶łŗ¶Ļ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ď ŗ¶įŗßüŗßáŗ¶õŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶® ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßüŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶ėŗ¶üŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗßüŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶∂ ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶õŗßĀ ŗ¶łŗ¶įŗ¶ł ŗ¶Öŗ¶•ŗ¶ö ŗ¶§ŗßÄŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶£ ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶āŗ¶∂ŗ•§ ŗ¶Įŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶Įŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶£ŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ł ŗ¶Öŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨, ŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶üŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ü, ŗ¶∂ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶¶ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ü, ŗ¶™ŗ¶Ņŗ¶†ŗ¶ĺ-ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶¨ŗßĀŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņ, ŗ¶Öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ ŗ¶Źŗ¶į ŗ¶óŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶™, ŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶ē ŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶ßŗßá ŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶†ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶üŗ¶ēŗ¶łŗ¶Ļ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶® ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∑ŗßüŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶Čŗ¶™ŗ¶į ŗ¶įŗßüŗßáŗ¶õŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶∂ ŗ¶ēŗßüŗßáŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶āŗ¶∂ŗ•§ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶ģŗ¶§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ď ŗ¶áŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶∂ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ď ŗ¶ģŗ¶ěŗßćŗ¶ö ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗßü ŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶áŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗßüŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶∂ŗ¶ē ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Üŗ¶®ŗßčŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģŗ•§ ŗ¶Üŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ļ ŗ¶łŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶óŗßÄŗ¶§ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶≠ŗßáŗ¶úŗ•§

ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶áŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶Čŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶Ėŗ¶Įŗßčŗ¶óŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗßÄŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®-ŗ¶Źŗ¶ł ŗ¶Źŗ¶ģ ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ļŗ¶łŗßÄŗ¶®, ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶ģ ŗ¶Üŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶ú, ŗ¶łŗßčŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗßüŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶® ŗ¶Ėŗßčŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶Üŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Üŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶ú, ŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶Čŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶® ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗ¶≤ŗßĀ, ŗ¶∂ŗ¶¨ŗ¶®ŗ¶ģ ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶≠ŗßÄŗ¶®, ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗßÄ ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶, ŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∑ ŗ¶≠ŗßĆŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē, ŗ¶Üŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶® ŗ¶Üŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶, ŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶≤ŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶įŗ¶Ļŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®, ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßĀ ŗ¶¨ŗßúŗßĀŗßüŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ ŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į, ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶™ŗßĀ, ŗ¶®ŗ¶úŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶áŗ¶łŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģ, ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶ē ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶™ŗ¶®, ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Ļŗßčŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶®, ŗ¶łŗ¶úŗ¶≤, ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶Üŗ¶®ŗßčŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ĻŗßÄ, ŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶® ŗ¶Öŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶, ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗßĀ, ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ ŗ¶öŗßĆŗ¶ßŗßĀŗ¶įŗßÄ, ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģ ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶¶, ŗ¶ģŗ¶®ŗ¶úŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶Üŗ¶≤ŗ¶ģ, ŗ¶áŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶Ļ ŗ¶Üŗ¶įŗßč ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶Ļŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßÄ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Įŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßÄŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ď ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ•§

ŗ¶óŗ¶£ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßĀŗ¶∑ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗßü ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗßĀŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶†ŗ¶ĺŗ¶® ŗ¶áŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶Źŗ¶á ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶Įŗßčŗ¶óŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ď ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ďŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶°ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗßü ŗß®ŗßĮ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßĀŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņ, ŗß®ŗß¶ŗß®ŗßß ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į-ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ ŗß¶ŗßģŗ¶üŗ¶ĺ ŗß™ŗß¶ ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗßĀŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶†ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ¶Éŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶óŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßÄ ŗß¶ŗß™ ŗ¶ęŗßáŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶įŗßĀŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņ, ŗß®ŗß¶ŗß®ŗßß ŗ¶¨ŗßÉŗ¶Ļŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ ŗß¶ŗßģŗ¶üŗ¶ĺ ŗß™ŗß¶ ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗßáŗ•§

ŗ¶áŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶įŗ¶öŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ď ŗ¶Čŗ¶™ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ę ŗ¶łŗ¶āŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶§ŗ•§ ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶£ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗßá ŗ¶ęŗ¶ĺŗ¶óŗßĀŗ¶® ŗ¶Öŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ď ŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶áŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶łŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗßá ŗ¶Įŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßÄŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ēŗßáŗßüŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßáŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶ł ŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗßáŗ¶°ŗ•§

Al Jazeera‚Äôs Investigative Unit has uncovered a criminal network colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh which is profiting from powerful links with the country‚Äôs prime minister.

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore.

ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶óŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗßáŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶õ ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ "ŗ¶ęŗßáŗ¶°ŗßč ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā" ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶Üŗ¶óŗßá ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶úŗ¶® ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶¨ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßÄŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Ļŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶Ļŗßčŗ¶ē, ŗ¶Öŗ¶ģŗ¶į ŗ¶Ź ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∑ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶£ŗ¶įŗßāŗ¶™ŗßá ŗ¶Öŗ¶łŗ¶öŗßáŗ¶§ŗ¶® ŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶ď ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶§ŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Įŗßá ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Āŗ¶į ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶įŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶į ŗ¶ęŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Üŗ¶įŗ¶ď ŗ¶Öŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ ŗ¶¶ŗßĀŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ď ŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶£ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶óŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ęŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ē ŗ¶öŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶į ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶öŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶įŗßāŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶Įŗ¶Ėŗ¶®ŗ¶á ŗ¶ēŗßčŗ¶®ŗ¶ď ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶õŗßĀ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ęŗßčŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ėŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶įŗßāŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶Įŗßáŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶į ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶úŗ¶® ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶łŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģ ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Įŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¶ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶Üŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶Įŗ¶Ėŗ¶®ŗ¶á ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶Čŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Öŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶Üŗ¶öŗ¶įŗ¶£ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ėŗßáŗ¶®, ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶úŗ¶® ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ ŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ē ŗ¶Öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶įŗßāŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶Üŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶Įŗ¶Ėŗ¶®ŗ¶á ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶õŗßĀ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ęŗßčŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ, ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶Öŗ¶¨ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶ęŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶į ŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßÄŗ¶® ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Āŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶úŗ¶ĺ ( ŗ¶áŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶ú ) ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶ē ŗ¶Źŗ¶ē ŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶¨ŗ¶§ŗßÄŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ, ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ď ŗ¶Öŗ¶¨ŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĻŗßĀŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶¨ ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶įŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶õŗßá ŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģŗßá, ŗ¶ēŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶ē ŗ¶úŗ¶® ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶∑ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶ęŗßćŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ü ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶öŗßáŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßá "ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ü ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņ" ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Čŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶£ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ•§ ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßĀ ŗ¶Ź "ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ü ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņ" ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ď ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶óŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶° ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶™ŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ•§ ŗ¶Üŗ¶į ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ėŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶łŗßá ŗ¶łŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶āŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶¶ŗ¶ģ ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ßŗ¶į ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶įŗßĀ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶Čŗ¶™ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶łŗ¶ēŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶Ļŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶™ŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶úŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶°ŗ¶É ŗ¶Öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Öŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ē ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®, ŗ¶Įŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶∂ŗßÄŗ¶ėŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶á ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶įŗßĀ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§

ŗ¶áŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģŗ¶ßŗßćŗ¶Įŗßá, ŗ¶Źŗ¶ęŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Üŗ¶á ŗ¶Öŗ¶ęŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ėŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶ó ( ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀ ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶āŗ¶Ļ ) ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶•ŗ¶ģ ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶¨ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßÄ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶§ŗ¶¶ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶įŗßĀ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶úŗ¶® ŗ¶Öŗ¶āŗ¶∂ŗßÄŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶£ŗßá , ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶® ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶¨ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßÄ ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶§ŗßÄ ŗ¶≤ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶Ļŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Öŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶£ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßāŗ¶Ļ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Źŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Čŗ¶™ŗ¶≤ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶ßŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶įŗ¶ď ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Įŗßá ŗ¶Źŗ¶á ŗ¶Ļŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶£ŗßćŗ¶°ŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶ģŗ¶į ŗ¶úŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶öŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶į ( ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶°ŗßá ) ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ß ŗ¶Ļŗ¶® ŗ•§ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Āŗ¶į ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗ¶≤ ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶źŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ•§ ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶Öŗ¶ģŗ¶į ŗ¶¨ŗßĀŗ¶Ěŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßáŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Įŗßá ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶õŗßĀ ŗ¶≠ŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ęŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶∂ŗ¶® ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Üŗ¶į ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ėŗ¶®ŗ¶á ŗ¶Ėŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗßćŗ¶ó ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Āŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶Ļŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßÄ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ßŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗßĀŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßÄ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶óŗßáŗ¶üŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶óŗßĀŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Ļŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶öŗßáŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶§ŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶óŗ¶ĺŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗßĀŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶ü ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶ę ŗ¶óŗßćŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ł ŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶£ŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶• ŗ¶Ļŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶úŗ¶® ŗ¶Üŗ¶óŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßĀŗ¶ē,ŗ¶¨ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßá ( snippet.description: Ravi Teja an orphan raised in an orphanage in Bangalore belonging to Ananda Bhupathi. Ananda gets killed by his own son Aditya Bhupathi, who later becomes the Home Minister. Ravi Teja runs into a tussle with Aditya's men, and this brings both Aditya and Ravi opposite each other. The fight that happens between then and how Ravi Teja brings Aditya to justice forms the plot.

Episode 409 : At The Store
-------------------------------------------
Three Friends - one blind, one mute, and one deaf are at a grocery store when they witness a crime taking place. A woman wearing a burkha and carrying a child is being chased by another man when impulsively she gives the baby to the deaf guy and leaves the store. The friends call CID, confused about what they should do. 

About CID:
--------------------
CID is an Indian detective television anthology series about India's Crime Investigation Department, created by B. P. Singh for Sony Entertainment Television India and Sony Entertainment Television Asia.  Following a pilot episode on 29 April 1997, the series premiered on 21 January 1998 and is the longest-running television series in India, having completed 19 years in January 2017 and entering the 20th year of its run. The show airs on Saturday and Sunday nights at 10:30 PM IST.

snippet.title: ŗ¶Öŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶≠ŗßĀŗ¶§ ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßÄŗ¶™ŗßá ŗ¶§ŗßĆŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ęŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņ | Munshiganj | Mawa Ghat | Tawhid Afridi | Vlog 79
snippet.description:
TAWHID AFRIDI - BIKRAMPUR - MUNSHIGANJ - MAWA GHAT - PADMA BRIDGE - ŗ¶§ŗßĆŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ęŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņ - ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßÄŗ¶™

In this vlog we showed the beauty of Munshiganj like Mawa Ghat, Padma Bridge, Ilish or Hilsa Fish & Dhaka Mawa Highway.

Edited By : Mahabub Hasan Murad
Color Grading : Hayat Mahmud

MUNSHIGANJ :-
Munshiganj, also historically known as Bikrampur, is a district in central Bangladesh. It is a part of the Dhaka Division and borders Dhaka District.

PADMA BRIDGE :-
The Padma Multipurpose Bridge is a multipurpose road-rail bridge across the Padma River, the main distributary of Ganges, under construction in Bangladesh with its own resources. It will connect Louhajong, Munshiganj to Shariatpur and Madaripur, linking the south-west of the country, to northern and eastern regions.

ILISH / HILSA :-
The ilish, also known as the ilisha, hilsa, hilsa herring or hilsa shad, is a species of fish related to the herring, in the family Clupeidae. It is a very popular and sought-after food fish in the Indian Subcontinent. The most famous hilsha fish comes from Chandpur District, Bangladesh.

snippet.description: The movie story deals with Abhiram a handsome looking NRI, who is born and brought up in London. Even though he lives abroad, Abhiram loves Indian culture and family values. One fine day, he comes to know about his dad's past which is related back to a huge family based in India.In order to fulfill his dad's dream, Abhiram lands in India. There he finds out that his roots are based in the joint family of Balaraju. Rest of the story is as to how Abhiram manages to successfully enter the family, and wins the love of everyone.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äď Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬†
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚ÄĚ the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚ÄĚ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚ÄĒinstigated by unseen forces‚ÄĒis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚ÄĚ), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚ÄĚ), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚ÄĚ), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚ÄĚ), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚ÄĚ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚ÄĚ), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚ÄĚ), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚ÄĚ).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚ÄĚ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚ÄĚ) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚ÄĚ), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚ÄĚ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚ÄĚ), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚ÄĚ), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚ÄĚ) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚ÄĚ DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚ÄĚ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you 2021's biggest party anthem - Drunk n High by hitmaker Mellow D & Aastha Gill starring Bollywood actress Adah Sharma for a one of a kind collaboration. The song has been composed by Akull and Mellow D, lyrics have been written by Mellow D and music video is a fun and quirky storyline directed by Robby Singh.

This party banger song is sure to set you in a mood to celebrate and lift your spirits this new year. Watch the video till the end to see @Adah Sharma  in her element ;).

localized.title: Drunk N High (Official Video) Mellow D, Aastha Gill | Adah Sharma | Akull | VYRLOriginals | New Song
localized.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you 2021's biggest party anthem - Drunk n High by hitmaker Mellow D & Aastha Gill starring Bollywood actress Adah Sharma for a one of a kind collaboration. The song has been composed by Akull and Mellow D, lyrics have been written by Mellow D and music video is a fun and quirky storyline directed by Robby Singh.

This party banger song is sure to set you in a mood to celebrate and lift your spirits this new year. Watch the video till the end to see @Adah Sharma  in her element ;).

snippet.title: Military takes power in Myanmar, Aung San Suu Kyi detained
snippet.description:
Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior figures from the ruling party have been detained in an early morning raid. 
The military declares a state of emergency following days of escalating tension between the civilian government and the powerful military, which claims the November election was tainted by fraud. 
 
Al Jazeera‚Äôs Victoria Gatenby reports.

snippet.title: India claim stunning series win, end Australia's Gabba streak | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
Rishabh Pant was the hero as an injury-ravaged India ended Australia's 32-year undefeated run at the Gabba, executing a record-breaking final day chase to win the Test by three wickets and the series 2-1.

snippet.title: EMIWAY - WHAT CAN I DO (PROD. BY FLAMBOY) (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Lyrics given below 

Artist /lyrics : Emiway Bantai 
Prod/ music : Flamboy 
Mix &master : Emiway Bantai
Director / dop : Canfuse
Associate director : Sankalp Vaid 
EDIT : Riddhi Hadkar
COLOURIST : Canfuse
Production- Bantai Studio 
Production management- Minta ,Sumit singh

Production Asst. - Akash Gurram, Mohan Shetty

Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSEBBb4B/ 
Hungama ‚Äď https://www.hungama.com/song/what-can-i-do/61789691/ 
JioSaavn ‚Äď https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/what-can-i-do/L14nHBJUbR4 
Wynk ‚Äď https://wynk.in/music/song/bhula-dunga/bl_A10320WT037785766X 
Gaana ‚Äď https://gaana.com/album/what-can-i-do-hindi

Lyrics
(Hook)
Boht sara hype hai apne pass bro 
God bless uh hope u all grow 
Patte chupake rakhela 
Nai karra show 
Nai bolna bro 
Agar tere woh 
dil se na ho 
Vibe nahi match kre 
Milte nai bro 
Jagah full pakdele 
Hilte nai bro 
Sab kare copy mera tareeka 
What can i do 

What can i do (x2)
What can i do yoo
What can i fo 
i got the views 
They wanna walk in my shoes 
What can i do (x3)
What can i do 
I got the moves 
They wanna walk in my shoes


Chapne do bhai 
Style mera dhapne do bhai 
Fame ke bhook mei 
Karrele nakli ladai 
Rapper log banrele bhai 
Kya toh sikhaye tumlogo 
Ke gane se 
Ek hi baat batarele ye zamanse 
Farak nai padta mujhe abhi kisi ke jane se 
Dil ko sambhal warna toot jayega kisiko
Chahnese 
Boht kuch seekhaya mei logo ko gaane 
Bandhiya bhi toh marti apne gaane pe 
Aisehich thodi na alag wajab 
Apan ayele cash deke gaadi pe 
Selected public invited hai party mei 
Dikhna tha smarty toh kam ki daadi mei 
Haters log latakrele mere Naadi mei 
Inkyamaakya apanich hard hai be 

(Hook)

Itne views lana lala tere bas ka nai 
Seedha shot dete bala 
Khota bajta nai 
Sadak ki boli lekin daam apna 
Sasta nai 
Nakli swag video mei lala jachta nai 
Karne kar par 
asal wala feel la 
Emiway fan base 
Dekhe beta sabka bheja hilla 
Diss gane fekde toh 
Chaddi bhi gilla 
Naklipan video mei aur koi ni milla ?

Ye bhai bante video mei 
Apan kulfa karate aise logo ko audio mei 
Jis jis se bhidjate us us ko pel dete 
Baki jo firak mei baithele unlog ko
Tel dete bolte chal masal 
Apan hai asal 
Logo ko pasand 
Har ek gana apna 
Rehta jashan 
Bakiyo ki baatcheet  
 La*da aur lassan 
Meko ni pasand 
Inlog ki soch 
Apni toh public hai dost
Vip meeting no easy approach 
Kaise kiya mei 
Ab baithke tu soch 
Mei mere dost
kamare fatte 
Blessing hai life 
Machare fatte
Nai chaiye advice 

Ua bitch is my ex bro
M receiving text bro 
Its my turn to flex bro 
I own what i manifest bro 
Soo soo many eyes on me 
blessed bro
I Got no time to waste bro 
If uh wanna move 
There are soo many ways bro
M livin my life at the best bro 
Lessgooo ūüĒ•
(Hook)

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we‚Äôre going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let‚Äôs head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don‚Äôt need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle ‚ÄĒ you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 ‚ÄĒ Perfectly round crepes
2:02 ‚ÄĒ No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 ‚ÄĒ Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 ‚ÄĒ DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 ‚ÄĒ A way to cut package tape 
8:12 ‚ÄĒ DIY compass using three pencils
